items.title: Exclusive Interview with Charlie Burgoyne, Founder & CEO of Valkyrie

content.content: In our latest episode of the Podcast series, Priya Dialani, Senior Editor, Analytics Insight speaks to Charlie Burgoyne, Founder & CEO of Valkyrie, a consulting group with domain expertise in applied science and strategy, to debunk more on the bias, myths, and ethical implications facing technology as algorithms tend to adopt the biases of their developers and of society as a whole.
